command:
echo '=== OLLAMA QUEUE STATE ==='
curl -s http://192.168.0.39:11434/api/ps 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read())
models=d.get('models',[])
if models:
    for m in models:
        print('RUNNING:', m.get('name'), 'size_vram:', m.get('size_vram'))
else:
    print('No models currently running (idle)')
"

curl -s http://192.168.0.106:11434/api/ps 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read())
models=d.get('models',[])
if models:
    for m in models:
        print('3060 RUNNING:', m.get('name'))
else:
    print('3060: idle')
"

echo '=== RUNNER STDOUT/STDERR VIA STRACE-FREE CHECK ==='
# Check if runner has open network connections to Ollama
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "cat /proc/\$(pgrep -f 'job-20260625T123626Z')/fd 2>/dev/null | head -5;      ss -tp 2>/dev/null | grep -E '11434|108495' | head -5;      cat /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/logs/job-20260625T123626Z-725c302a.runner.log 2>/dev/null || echo empty_log" 2>&1

echo DONE_1938
